text: A small language model learns by predicting the next token from the tokens that came before it.
Distributed training combines work from several devices while preserving one global optimization objective.
A document boundary must remain visible when long web pages are split into fixed length parent sequences.
Right padding marks positions that do not belong to the original document and must not contribute targets.
Checkpoint replay restores random generators, data positions, optimizer state, and scheduler state together.
Validation uses the longest context and reports full loss and perplexity without a signed estimator shortcut.
The attention resolver measures local kernels and selects one backend shared by every distributed rank.
An explicit attention choice fails loudly when its package or hardware capability is unavailable.
Full precision reduction keeps token losses stable even when matrix multiplications use lower precision.
The global valid token denominator makes gradients independent of uneven padding across ranks.
A local worker can finish the remaining chunks of its current row before reading the next row.
The reference model and the library model share parameter names, masks, positions, and exported weights.
Sequence chunked language modeling heads avoid retaining one full batch by sequence by vocabulary tensor.
Russian roulette corrections may be negative while their expected gradient remains the full gradient.
Safe estimator templates use unit tail probabilities until calibration supplies measured probabilities.
Calibration measures exact gradient Gram matrices, execution time, peak memory, variance, and expected cost.
An atomic checkpoint is visible only after all required rank files and its manifest are complete.
Common floating point weights start a new run without carrying optimizer or data iterator state.
A deterministic seed controls model initialization, data shard order, and level sampling state.
Microbatch accumulation delays gradient synchronization until the final microbatch of an update.
Optimizer roles place hidden attention and feed forward matrices in Muon and all other tensors in AdamW.
The local metrics file remains available even when remote experiment logging is disabled.
A production run records its source hash, resolved packages, data revision, and complete command line.
External multi device validation is required before a distributed combination is declared complete.
